{{Concept | Name=Space Marine Chaplain | Guid=3015-13317 | Deck=Though their black armor and grim appearance (most notably skull helmets) might make them seem servants of Chaos, Chaplains are quite the opposite; they are the Space Marines who zealously revere the God-Emperor and just as zealously keep watch on their fellows to ensure their loyalty to the cause is unflinching and their hearts untainted by heresy. | Characters=Characters/Leandros | Concepts=Concepts/Adeptus_Astartes,Concepts/Clerics,Concepts/Fascism,Concepts/Imperium_of_Man,Concepts/Religion,Concepts/Religious_Themes,Concepts/Skull_Helmets,Concepts/Space_Marine,Concepts/Zealot | Franchises= | Games=Games/Warhammer_40_000_Space_Marine_II | Locations= | Objects=Objects/Bolt_Pistol,Objects/Boltgun,Objects/Chainsword,Objects/Gauntlets,Objects/Heavy_Bolter,Objects/Helmet,Objects/Plasma_Pistol_1159,Objects/Power_Armor,Objects/Power_Sword | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3641729-screenshot2024-09-05000121.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3641729-screenshot2024-09-05000121.png","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_medium,square_small,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_super,square_avatar,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Though their black armor and grim appearance (most notably skull helmets) might make them seem servants of Chaos, Chaplains are quite the opposite; they are the Space Marines who zealously revere the God-Emperor and just as zealously keep watch on their fellows to ensure their loyalty to the cause is unflinching and their hearts untainted by heresy.

{{Concept | Name=Texas Longhorns | Guid=3015-13209 | Deck=The Longhorns are the mascot of the University of Texas at Austin, one of the largest and most prestigious public universities in the United States. Located in the state's capital, teams representing the school rival professional clubs in terms of popularity. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_25,Games/EA_Sports_College_Football_26,Games/March_Madness_98,Games/MVP_06_NCAA_Baseball,Games/NBA_2K16,Games/NCAA_Basketball_10,Games/NCAA_Football_09,Games/NCAA_Football_2002 | Locations=Locations/Austin,Locations/Texas,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Objects= | People= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3608637-6305779939-texas.png}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3608637-6305779939-texas.png","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,square_mini,scale_small,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Texas Longhorn is a specific breed of cattle, with horns that can span up to 8 feet in length. Along with the armadillo, it is considered a quintessential symbol of the state itself. The Texas Longhorns are one of the storied franchises of [[Franchises/EA_Sports_College_Football|college football]], with over 900 wins and 4 national championships. They are frequently included in college football games.
